expectations.text: States (statement -> tail-recursion) #9 is NOT available for this tree recursion (no single tail call)
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: "flatten is tree recursion: you recurse per element and combine results after the call, so the recursive call is not in tail position ... (statement -> tail-recursion) #9 is simply not available here. There's no tail form to reach for."
